tasks.description: Verify Cloudflare Access JWTs and resolve login requests to user:<access-sub> principals with tenant grants.
Add per-tenant profile storage for display name, email, company name, organization name, and avatar URL.
Add tenant-scoped groups with owner/admin/member roles independent of company or organization labels.
Add resource ACLs and share endpoints for knowledge docs and decision memories, including owner and group-admin checks.
Apply principal and group ACL checks during decision memory search/context enrichment and knowledge doc search/context/detail.
Add Console profile and groups pages, plus navigation entries.
Update docs/env examples and add focused auth, ACL, and sharing tests.
Add Playwright E2E coverage for authenticated profile/login identity and memory management search/detail/refresh flows.
